gamelift.build.storagelocation.Bucket.Docs: An Amazon S3 bucket identifier. This is the name of the S3 bucket.  GameLift currently does not support uploading from Amazon S3 buckets with names that contain a dot (.).

gamelift.build.storagelocation.Key.Docs: The name of the zip file that contains the build files or script files.

gamelift.build.storagelocation.ObjectVer.Docs: The version of the file, if object versioning is turned on for the bucket. Amazon GameLift uses this information when retrieving files from your S3 bucket. To retrieve a specific version of the file, provide an object version. To retrieve the latest version of the file, do not set this parameter.

gamelift.build.storagelocation.RoleArn.Docs: The Amazon Resource Name ([ARN](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/dev/s3-arn-format.html)) for an IAM role that allows Amazon Web Services to access the S3 bucket.
